programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: A poet and his interpreter travel to Italy, to research the life of an 18th-century composer. 1983. Italy, Soviet Union. Director: Andrei Tarkovsky. Starring: Oleg Yankovskiy, Erland Josephson.

programme.title: Honey Kaha
programme.desc: A low-budget streetwise cop, Honey Kaha, takes to the streets to fight oppression and colonisation. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Te Waiarangi Ratana. Starring: Kura Turuwhenua, Bailey Poching.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: Plagued by guilt, a pilot seeks redeption when a monster he failed to kill returns supercharged. 2023. Japan. Director: Takashi Yamazaki. Starring: Minami Hamabe, Ryûnosuke Kamiki.

programme.title: Brazil
programme.desc: Technocrat Sam escapes the monotony of everyday life by day dreaming about rescuing the woman of his dreams. 1985. UK, USA. Director: Terry Gilliam. Starring: Jonathan Pryce, Kim Greist.

programme.title: The Food Club: Home Again
programme.desc: We reunite with three life-long friends, food, friendship and new challenges await. 2025. Denmark. Director: Charlotte Sachs Bostrup. Staring: Rasmus Botoft, Helle Dolleris.

programme.title: Alien: Terror In Space
programme.desc: From the outermost reaches of space, to the comfort of your lounge, learn what made the cinema classic 'Alien' so successful. 2025. France. Directors: Anne Cutaia, Sophie Peyrard.

programme.title: Ad Astra
programme.desc: One man follows in his fathers footsteps to mission across the universe to investigate a mysterious phenomenon. 2019. USA, China. Director: James Gray. Starring: Brad Pitt, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: Splice Here: A Projected Odyssey
programme.desc: Take a look at the passionate group of projectionists keeping the art of physical film projection alive. 2022. Australia. Director: Rob Murphy.

programme.title: Passenger
programme.desc: 1/4. Riya confronts someone; new evidence reveals what happened to Mehmet; Katie heads into the forest. 2024. UK. Director: Nicole Charles. Starring: Wunmi Mosaku.

programme.title: Passenger
programme.desc: 1/5. As Riya gets closer to the truth, Jim faces his fears and Eddie hits rock bottom. 2024. UK. Director: Nicole Charles. Starring: Wunmi Mosaku.

programme.title: Passenger
programme.desc: 1/6. Shocking revelations rock Riya, while Ali and Nish piece together the remaining clues. 2024. UK. Director: Nicole Charles. Starring: Wunmi Mosaku.

programme.title: All We Imagine As Light
programme.desc: In Mumbai, three nurses grow closer as they navigate loss, longing, and hardships. 2024. India. Director: Payal Kapadia. Starring: Kani Kusruti, Divya Prabha, Chhaya Kadam.

programme.title: Lagerfeld: Ambitions
programme.desc: 1/3. In the early 1980s, Karl Lagerfeld decides to create his own brand. 2024. France. Directors: Guillaume Perez, Anne-Solen Douguet.

programme.title: Lagerfeld: Ambitions
programme.desc: 1/4. When Yves Saint Laurent dies, Karl Lagerfeld is the only personification of high fashion. 2024. France. Directors: Guillaume Perez, Anne-Solen Douguet.

programme.desc: After years apart, a couple is reunited, but their passionate reunion reignites long forgotten memories. 2024. Netherlands. Director: Desiree Nosbusch. Starring: Tim Roth, Trine Dyrholm.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: A British police officer and a Jewish woman fall in love amidst the political turmoil of 1930s Tel Aviv. 2023. UK. Director: Michael Winterbottom. Starring: Irina Starshenbaum, Harry Melling.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: A model police cadet, and a Triad gang recruit go undercover to infiltrate the other. 2002. Hong Kong. Directosr: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Andy Lau, Tony Leung Chiu-wai.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In this prequel, a policeman sets out to infiltrate the Triad gangs. 2003. Hong Kong, Singapore. Directors: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Edison Chen, Shawn Yue.

programme.desc: Lacy spends summer at home with her mother Janet. Her wild imagination captivates everyone around her. 2023. USA, UK. Director: Annie Baker. Starring: Zoe Ziegler, Luke Philip Bosco.

programme.title: William Shatner: You Can Call Me Bill
programme.desc: Lift the veil on William Shatner's countless characters embodied over his 90 years on earth. 2023. USA. Directors: Alexandre O. Philippe.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/1. Finnish tech company, Nokia, is in deep water when US tech giant, Motorola sues them for patent infringements. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Jukka Aaltonen, Oona Airola.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/2. A power sruggle breaks out between Nokia executives, and Katarina proves her worth as a negotiator. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Leia Ahlstrom, Oona Airola.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/3. Katarina and Aki tackle defence for the Motorola case, while cutbacks at Nokia push Risto's project into the bin. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Oona Airola, Elmer Back.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/4. Motorola's legal team arrive at Nokia's offices, project Northstar kicks off to begin the sale of Nokia. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Magnus Af Sandeberg, Oona Airola.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/5. The courtcase travels to the United States, while Risto surprises his wife with a honeymoon in France. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Magnus Af Sandeberg, Oona Airola.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/6. The relationship between Katarina and Aki treads uncertain grounds and Jorma gets an interesting job offer. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Oona Airola, Martin Bahne.

programme.desc: An applejack endeavours to trap 100's of beavers in order to become the greatest beaver trapper. 2022. USA. Director: Mike Cheslik. Starring: Ryland Brickson Cole Tews, Olivia Graves.
